headline: Guggenheim Maintains Buy on TKO Group Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $230
summary: Guggenheim  analyst Curry Baker   maintains TKO Group Holdings (NYSE:TKO) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $232 to $230.
